videos.headline: South Carolina shuts down NC State on late fourth-and-goal
videos.description: Down seven with 15 seconds left, Wolfpack quarterback Ryan Finley's pass is batted down sealing the 35-28 victory for the Gamecocks.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (South Carolina shuts down NC State on late fourth-and-goal) 2017/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: South Carolina returns opening kickoff for TD
videos.description: Deebo Samuel returns the game's opening kick for a 97-yard touchdown to give South Carolina an early lead against NC State.

videos.headline: Finley fools South Carolina's defense for TD
videos.description: Ryan Finley runs in a 6-yard touchdown for NC State.

videos.headline: Dowdle's juggling catch helps South Carolina reclaim the lead
videos.description: Jake Bentley finds Rico Dowdle along the sidelines for a 34-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: NC State uses flea-flicker for huge gain
videos.description: NC State uses trickery to set up Cole Cook's 29-yard catch to put the Wolfpack in the red zone.

videos.headline: Bentley finds Samuel to give a South Carolina the lead
videos.description: Jake Bentley finds Deebo Samuel for the six-yard touchdown in the second quarter.

videos.headline: Finley connects with Meyers for a TD
videos.description: Ryan Finley connects with Jakobi Meyers for a four-yard touchdown to tie the game going into halftime.

videos.headline: Samuel hauls in one-handed TD for South Carolina
videos.description: Deebo Samuel makes a 39-yard touchdown grab to give the Gamecocks an early second-half lead.

videos.headline: Samuels' TD cuts into South Carolina's lead
videos.description: Ryan Finley completes a pass to Jaylen Samuels for a one-yard touchdown, closing in on the Gamecocks.

videos.headline: NC State ties game with 2-yard run
videos.description: Nyheim Hines forces his way into the end zone for a Wolfpack touchdown.

videos.headline: NC State turns it over on fumble
videos.description: Stephen Louis fumbles the ball and it's recovered by Rashad Fenton.

videos.headline: Finley's 32-yard pass sets up NC State in the red zone
videos.description: Ryan Finley connects with Jakobi Meyers to give the Wolfpack great field position.

videos.headline: Boone sacks Bentley for loss
videos.description: Shawn Boone is untouched on the blitz and sacks Jake Bentley for a loss of nine yards.

videos.headline: Muschamp fired up over lack of headsets
videos.description: South Carolina Head Coach Will Muschamp recaps the first half and is especially upset over the fact that his staff didn't have headsets.

videos.headline: Sawyer's sack results in turnover
videos.description: Dante Sawyer sacks Ryan Finley to cause a turnover and give South Carolina the ball in the red zone.

videos.headline: Dowdle's TD run extends South Carolina's lead
videos.description: Rico Dowdle runs for a seven-yard touchdown in the third quarter.

videos.headline: Alston picks off pass
videos.description: Johnathan Alston picks off the pass to shift the momentum of the game.

videos.headline: Riley makes a great catch along sideline
videos.description: Ryan Finley completes to C.J. Riley for 21 yards.
